prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年重庆大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约12005名、12013名、11453名、12364名、11301名，整体在11300–12400区间波动，近5年无明显单向 趋势；2025年基准位次约11301名，较2024年回升约1063名；2021–2025年该校在浙江综合类招生计划分别为141人、128人、128人、135人、136人，整体略有增 长；2026年计划142人，较2025年增加6人，小幅扩招约4.4%，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 重庆大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大 学主榜排名近年稳定在第33–34名，属于国内顶尖高校梯队，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及实验室安全事件，可能 对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第23（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映考生关注度不低；历史投档异常记录中未见该校明显断档信号；第五 轮学科评估中，土木工程获评A+，机械工程、环境科学与工程、电气工程、风景园林学获评A-；电气工程、机械工程等优势学科与当前高热专业（电气、计算机、电子信息）高度 关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类均为高热推荐，重庆大学在上述领域 均有A-级学科支撑，有利于吸引高分考生；浙江省2026年普通高考总人数约40万，较2025年综合类29万大幅增长，竞争环境显著加剧；重庆大学位于重庆市，非浙江省内高校；该校在浙江招生占比约1.2%–2%，属跨省招生，地域偏好因素不突出。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合202 5年基准位次11301名、2026年小幅扩招约4.4%、浙江省考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧）、学校声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）、优势学科与高热专业匹 配（吸引高分考生）等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移；预测位次约11650名，区间11150–12150名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越计划）
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖计划）
- 电气工程及其自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（计算机与智能软件）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）
- 理科试验班（数理基础）
- 工科试验班（智能网联汽车创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与先进材料）
- 人文科学试验班（法学新闻类）
- 汉语言文学（博雅类）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约11650名，区间11150–12150名。位次在区间下限（11150名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（卓越计划、拔尖计划、电气工程）；位次在区间中段（约11650名）建议 以二档为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（12150名）附近建议以三档保底为主，二档适度冲刺。注意工科试验班类内分流政策，卓越计划可任选全校四年制理工科专业，性 价比极高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Chongqing University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 12005, 12013, 11453, 12364, and 11301, fluctuating within the 11300–12400 range, with no clear unidirectional trend in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11301, an increase of about 1063 places compared to 2024; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for this university in Zhejiang's comprehensive category were 141, 128, 128, 135, and 136 students respectively, showing a slight overall increase; the 2026 plan is 142 students, an increase of 6 students from 2025, a small expansion of about 4.4%, which somewhat alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been stable at 33rd–34th in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, with sustained appeal to candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving laboratory safety incidents, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; its Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting considerable candidate attention; no obvious signal of score gaps was found in historical admission anomaly records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, civil engineering was rated A+, mechanical engineering, environmental science and engineering, electrical engineering, and landscape architecture were rated A-; advantageous disciplines such as electrical engineering and mechanical engineering are highly correlated with currently popular majors (electrical, computer, electronic information), strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that electrical engineering and automation, electronic information/communication, and computer science are all highly recommended hot majors, and Chongqing University has A- level discipline support in these fields, which helps attract high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase from the 290,000 comprehensive category candidates in 2025, sharply intensifying the competitive environment; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing City, not within Zhejiang Province; its enrollment proportion in Zhejiang is about 1.2%–2%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no prominent regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 11301, a small expansion of about 4.4% in 2026, a substantial increase in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province (intensified competition), a slightly negative university reputation (mild suppression), and the match between advantageous disciplines and hot majors (attracting high-scoring candidates), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025; the predicted ranking is approximately 11650, with a range of 11150–12150.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Program)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top-Notch Program)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Foundation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Connected Vehicle Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 11650, with a range of 11150–12150. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (11150) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Excellence Program, Top-Notch Program, Electrical Engineering); those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 11650) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper bound (12150) should mainly use Tier 3 as a safety option, with moderate attempts at Tier 2. Note the internal分流 policy of the Engineering Experimental Class; the Excellence Program allows selection of any four-year science and engineering major in the university, offering extremely high cost-effectiveness.
